# KittyCode Creative

> KittyCode Creative is a modern web design and development agency based in Eastbourne, East Sussex, UK. We build bespoke, fully accessible (WCAG-compliant) and responsive websites from scratch for individuals and small businesses. Every project includes SEO and hosting options.

## About

KittyCode Creative caters to individuals promoting a personal website or portfolio, and small businesses improving their digital footprint or updating their online presence. With a low price of entry, all websites are hand-coded from scratch using best practices, never from templates, to ensure they are fully WCAG (Web Content Accessibility Guidelines) compliant and responsive on all browsers and devices.

We currently focus exclusively on building websites (web design, front-end development and SEO). We no longer offer logo design in order to provide the best quality websites - no compromises.

## Services & Pricing

- **Standard**: £40/month or £650 one-off. 1–3 page website, hosting included, enhanced security, 10,000 monthly visits, secure SSL. Best for individuals. 12 month contract (monthly) or 50% deposit (one-off). £300 initial design fee.
- **Premium** (recommended): £75/month or £2000 one-off. 4–10 page website, hosting included, unlimited updates, 100,000 monthly visits, secure SSL. Best for startups. 24 month contract or 50% deposit. £450 initial design fee.
- **Premium+**: £100/month or £3000 one-off. Up to 100 pages, CMS content & blog pages, increased hosting speed, 1,000,000 monthly visits, priority edits. Best for small businesses. 24 month contract or 50% deposit. £750 initial design fee.

All packages include SEO and a fully bespoke, accessible build. Hosting is included in monthly packages; one-off purchases can be hosted for an additional fee.

## Key facts

- Bespoke, hand-coded websites (no templates)
- Fully WCAG-compliant and accessible
- Responsive on all browsers and devices
- SEO included with every package
- Based in Eastbourne, serving clients across the UK
